sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: China Universal Asset Management Co. Ltd. Invests $3.44 Million in Futu Holdings Limited Sponsored ADR $FUTU
feed.summary: China Universal Asset Management Co. Ltd. has acquired a new stake worth $3.44 million in Futu Holdings Limited Sponsored ADR (NASDAQ:FUTU) during the third quarter. This investment is part of a broader institutional trend, with several other large firms increasing or establishing positions in Futu. The company recently reported strong financial results, beating earnings and revenue expectations, and holds a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $205.06.

feed.title: A Closer Look at DIVO: An Active Approach to Dividend Enhancement
feed.summary: The Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income ETF (DIVO) utilizes an active covered call strategy on a focused portfolio of high-quality, large-cap stocks to generate an attractive dividend yield, currently around 4.7%. Its unique approach, which involves writing covered calls on individual stock positions rather than an entire index, aims to both enhance income and preserve capital appreciation potential. This strategy has consistently attracted significant institutional capital, highlighting its appeal in the income-ETF market.

feed.title: GameSquare Announces 1,038,787 Shares Repurchase
feed.summary: GameSquare Holdings, Inc. announced it repurchased 1,038,787 shares of its common stock for $563,801 at an average price of approximately $0.54 per share. This transaction leaves the company with approximately $3.3 million remaining under its current authorization and is part of a strategy to opportunistically repurchase common stock. Since October 2025, GameSquare has repurchased a total of 2,992,517 shares for $1,728,756, underscoring its capital allocation priorities and commitment to sustained value creation.

feed.title: New skin test steers severe eczema patients to faster JAK drug relief
feed.summary: Castle Biosciences announced that its AdvanceAD-Tx test can identify patients with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis who are more likely to respond significantly better and faster to JAK inhibitor therapy. A prospective study published in JAAD demonstrated that about 30% of patients had a "JAK Inhibitor Responder Profile," achieving EASI-90 nearly four times faster with JAKi treatment compared to Th2-targeted therapies. This molecular insight aims to help clinicians personalize treatment earlier, reducing unnecessary therapy changes and accelerating positive clinical outcomes.

feed.title: Committed to community: Huntington Bank completes merger with Cadence Bank, continues to grow client base
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated has officially merged with Cadence Bank, a strategic move that significantly expands Huntington's presence in Texas and the South. The combined entity boasts approximately $279 billion in assets and nearly 1,400 branch locations across 21 states. Huntington Bank plans to maintain all Cadence branches and is actively growing its client base, including in North Carolina and Fayetteville, by focusing on a community-based approach and investing in technology.

feed.title: Amgen Inc. $AMGN Shares Acquired by China Universal Asset Management Co. Ltd.
feed.summary: China Universal Asset Management Co. Ltd. significantly increased its stake in Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) during the third quarter, making it their 10th-largest holding. Amgen exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, provided strong FY2026 guidance, and recently raised its quarterly dividend. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $345.16.

feed.title: Equinix files pricing term sheet for offering of $700 million 4.400% senior notes due 2031
feed.summary: Equinix, Inc. has filed a pricing term sheet for an offering of $700 million in 4.400% senior notes due in 2031. The company, a leading operator of data processing centers, also recently saw insider share sales worth significant amounts. Analysts have adjusted price targets for Equinix, with most maintaining a 'Buy' or 'Sector Outperform' rating.

feed.title: Tata Electronics Partners with Qualcomm for Automotive Modules Manufacturing
feed.summary: Tata Electronics is partnering with Qualcomm to manufacture automotive modules in India, leveraging its new $3 billion semiconductor assembly and test facility in Jagiroad. This collaboration supports the "Make in India" initiative and aims to meet the growing demand for advanced automotive technologies like digital cockpits and intelligent vehicle systems. This partnership also integrates Tata Electronics into Qualcomm's global manufacturing network, enhancing its market position in the automotive sector.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Southern Copper, Freeport-McMoRan, Lundin Mining and Coeur Mining
feed.summary: Zacks Equity Research highlights Southern Copper Corp., Freeport-McMoRan Inc., Lundin Mining Corp., and Coeur Mining as promising stocks in the non-ferrous metal mining industry. The industry is poised for growth due to rising metal prices, increasing demand driven by energy transition, and the strategic importance of metals like silver, copper, and uranium. Companies are focusing on reserve expansion, technological investment, and cost control to capitalize on these trends.

feed.title: AngloGold Ashanti Q4 and Year Ended 31 December 2025 Earnings Release and Dividend Declaration
feed.summary: AngloGold Ashanti reported record financial results for 2025, with free cash flow tripling to $2.9 billion and Adjusted EBITDA more than doubling to $6.3 billion. The company declared a Q4 interim dividend of $875 million, contributing to a total of $1.8 billion in dividends for the year. Gold production increased by 16%, and the company achieved record safety performance while outlining an updated outlook for 2026, including higher royalty costs.

feed.title: INSEEGO CORP. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Inseego Corp. has released its 2025 10-K report, revealing a 13.1% decrease in total revenues to $166.2 million, largely due to reduced sales in mobile solutions, though gross profit margin improved to 42.7%. The report details the company's focus on cloud-managed wireless WAN and 5G solutions, strategic initiatives like divestitures and debt restructuring, and challenges including reliance on key customers and supply chain risks. Inseego aims for profitable operations, positive cash flow, and expansion into enterprise and SMB markets.

feed.title: Gartner $110M sale of Digital Markets division in latest SEC filing
feed.summary: Gartner's latest SEC filing reveals the sale of its Digital Markets division, including Capterra, GetApp, and Software Advice, for approximately $110 million to G2. The article details how this financial information, initially absent from public announcements, was disclosed in the company's Form 10-K filed on February 12, 2026. The reported figure is "before customary purchase price adjustments," indicating the final amount could change based on post-closing reconciliations.

feed.title: Five9, Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Five9, Inc. has released its annual 10-K report detailing significant financial growth, strategic initiatives, and operational highlights for the fiscal year. The report emphasizes the company's evolution towards an AI-native Intelligent CX Platform, expanding its customer base, and addressing macroeconomic challenges. Five9 achieved $1,149.1 million in revenue and a net income of $39.4 million, while also outlining challenges related to economic conditions, AI transition, and operational risks.

feed.title: Teradyne (TER) NASDAQ $315.90 pre-mkt Feb 20 2026: AI demand could lift guidance
feed.summary: Teradyne (TER) stock is trading at $315.90 pre-market, driven by stronger-than-expected Q4 results and bullish Q1 2026 guidance linked to AI chip demand, despite a high valuation. Meyka AI rates TER with a "BUY" score of 76.48, though short-term forecasts suggest potential consolidation. Analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus, with a wide range of price targets reflecting the stock's growth prospects alongside its valuation risks.

feed.title: A dual-coast LNG strategy
feed.summary: Sempra Infrastructure is pursuing a dual-coast LNG strategy, developing facilities on both the US Gulf Coast and Mexico Pacific Coast to serve Atlantic and Pacific markets. The company's Vice President, Carlos de la Vega, discusses the progress of projects like Port Arthur LNG and Cameron LNG. This approach aims to provide competitive and flexible LNG supply to a global market.

feed.title: After Earnings, Is Coinbase Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Morningstar has decreased its fair value estimate for Coinbase Global to $160 from $188 following its fourth-quarter earnings report, citing expected declines in near-term trading revenue due to cryptocurrency price volatility. Despite major headwinds, Coinbase is seen as fairly valued and is projected to remain profitable by diversifying its revenue streams, though it lacks an economic moat. The company maintains a strong financial position with significant cash reserves, mitigating risks associated with highly speculative and volatile cryptocurrency markets.

feed.title: News Corp outlines US$1B 2025 repurchase program; bought ~$61.9M to date, $38.2M on Feb 19
feed.summary: News Corp has announced an ongoing US$1 billion share repurchase program for 2025 aimed at enhancing shareholder value. To date, the company has bought approximately US$61.9 million in Class A and B shares under this program, with a significant purchase of US$38.21 million for over 1.5 million shares occurring on February 19, 2026. Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC is facilitating these on-market repurchases.

feed.title: AbbVie wins FDA approval for Venclexta-acalabrutinib combo in first-line chronic lymphocytic leukemia
feed.summary: AbbVie announced that the FDA has approved its Venclexta (venetoclax) and acalabrutinib combination regimen for the treatment of previously untreated adults with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL). This approval expands the therapeutic options for patients battling this type of blood cancer in the first-line setting.

feed.title: Amphastar Pharmaceuticals to Release Fourth Quarter Earnings and Hold Conference Call on February 26, 2026
feed.summary: Amphastar Pharmaceuticals, Inc. announced it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, February 26, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time on the same day to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the call via a toll-free number or the company's investor website, with a webcast replay available within 24 hours.

feed.title: Tebo achieves Circle of Success recognition at Ameriprise Financial
feed.summary: Skyler Tebo, a Private Wealth Advisor with Privian Wealth at Ameriprise Financial Services, LLC. in Hays, has been recognized with the company's Circle of Success award for 2026. This distinction is given to a select number of high-performing advisors who demonstrate exceptional client service and financial advice. Tebo will be honored for this achievement this year.

feed.title: Philip Morris International Inc. $PM Shares Sold by Factory Mutual Insurance Co.

The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price near $194.06 and offers an attractive annualized dividend yield of approximately 3.2%.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Downgrades Molina Healthcare to Equalweight From Overweight, Adjusts PT to $141 From $208

This adjustment reflects a more cautious outlook on the healthcare provider's stock. The article also lists several other recent analyst adjustments to Molina Healthcare's price target and ratings.

feed.title: GLPI widens profits, announces dividend
feed.summary: Gaming & Leisure Properties Inc. (GLPI) announced significantly increased profits for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, reaching $275.4 million and $850.4 million respectively. The company also declared a dividend of $0.78 per share and highlighted strong tenant stability and ongoing development projects totaling $2.6 billion, including funding for Bally’s Chicago and recent acquisitions. CEO Peter Carlino expressed confidence in future growth and shareholder value.

feed.title: Griffon Shareholders Back Board, Executive Pay and Auditor
feed.summary: At its 2026 Annual Meeting, Griffon shareholders overwhelmingly supported the election of 11 directors to the board, approved executive compensation on an advisory basis, and ratified Grant Thornton LLP as the independent accounting firm. With 88% of common stock represented, these decisions signal strong confidence in the company's leadership, pay structure, and financial oversight. An analyst from Tipranks has a Buy rating on GFF stock with a $115.00 price target.

feed.title: Cemex Executes MXN$110 Million Share Buyback Under Ongoing Program
feed.summary: Cemex (CX) repurchased 5.05 million CPOs for approximately MXN$110 million on February 18, 2026, as part of an ongoing shareholder-approved buyback program. This transaction, totaling about U.S.$6.41 million, underscores the company's commitment to capital management, shareholder returns, and balance-sheet optimization. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates CX as "Outperform" due to solid financial performance and supportive earnings guidance.
